question: [File: 'File Name: grpc/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/grpc/listener/TopicListener.java -> Scope: '] [Function: getSharedListener(TopicMessageFilter filter) in RedisTopicListener] Can an unprivileged user enumerate all active topic subscriptions by observing Redis channel names in the format `topic.<id>` (derived from `getTopic()`) through side-channel timing attacks or Redis monitoring, revealing which topic IDs are currently being subscribed to by other users?
